name: @ganaweb/sync
description: GanaWeb sync protocol. PR1 ships interfaces only (push/pull/conflict-resolver ports). No implementation this change.

scripts.build: find src -name '*.ts' -o -name '*.tsx' 2>/dev/null | grep -q . && tsc --noEmit || echo 'PR1 stub: no source files yet'
scripts.typecheck: find src -name '*.ts' -o -name '*.tsx' 2>/dev/null | grep -q . && tsc --noEmit || echo 'PR1 stub: no source files yet'
scripts.test: echo "@ganaweb/sync: no tests in PR1 stub"
scripts.ci: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run lint && pnpm run test
